Metadata.SourceFile: Milky Weigh, The (30 Games - Argus Press Software - Side 1).tap
Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx basic,$0801,$ffff "THEMILKYWEIGH-1400" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Milky Weigh, The.prg"
